text: Multiple fire pumps may be used for other purposes provided that one pump is

options.text: A) On line to the fire main
B) Kept available for use on the fire main at all times
C) Capable of being connected to the fire main
D) Rated at or above 125 psi

explanation: While fire pumps can be used for other essential duties like ballast or general service, at least one pump must always remain on standby or be immediately connectable to the fire main to ensure instantaneous readiness during an emergency.
